/usr/bin/c++  -g -std=c++11 CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver/src/ChatServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver/src/ChatService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver/src/ConnectionPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver/src/MySQL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver/src/Redis.cpp.o -o /home/makise/cpp/bin/ChatServer  -Wl,-rpath,/home/makise/cpp/mymuduo/lib /home/makise/cpp/mymuduo/lib/libmymuduo.so -lmysqlclient -lhiredis -lpthread
